narrative:
Lynchburg (precinct in Highland County) has 962 registered voters, with 57.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.3 percentage points.
